data.title: CI&T To Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 11, 2026
data.description: In New York, CI&T Inc. (NYSE: CINT) will be releasing its first quarter financial results for 2026 on May 11, 2026, after the market closes. The company, a leading provider of tech-integrated business solutions globally, will have its senior management team conduct a video conference call on the same day at 4:30 PM Eastern Time / 5:30 PM BRT to discuss the financial and operating performance. Investors and interested parties can access the video conference call through the Company's platform.

data.title: Understanding and Addressing Syphilis Trends - and What's Being Missed
data.description: San Diego-based QuidelOrtho Corporation, a prominent player in the field of in vitro diagnostics and listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol QDEL, recently unveiled the latest installment, episode 57, of its Science Bytes podcast. This episode delves into the changing landscape of syphilis in the US, shedding light on the increasing prevalence of congenital syphilis cases despite...

data.title: Nitinotes Announces First Commercial EndoZip™ Procedures in Spain
data.description: After receiving CE Mark approval, Nitinotes Ltd., a medical tech company based in CAESAREA, Israel, is expanding its European rollout. Their automated suturing system, the first of its kind to receive CE mark certification for endoscopic sleeve gastroplasty (ESG), has been approved. This announcement was made on April 23, 2026. The company is extending its reach in Europe following this milestone, indicating significant progress for the innovative technology.

data.title: LuminoCity Dino Safari Festival Debuts in Metro Charlotte May 6-June 14
data.description: Concord Mills has been reimagined into a captivating prehistoric world with the launch of LuminoCity Festival's Dino Safari. This unique experience in Charlotte, N.C. features mesmerizing dinosaur-themed light displays that will take visitors on a journey through the past. The festival, set to debut on April 23, 2026, promises an unforgettable adventure for attendees. This walk-through experience is designed to transport guests into a world filled with impressive light installations and interactive exhibits, all centered around the theme of dinosaurs. With Concord Mills serving as the backdrop, the LuminoCity Dino Safari Festival is set to attract a large number of visitors, turning the area into a must-see destination for those seeking a unique and immersive experience.

data.title: Carnival Corporation Expands Mexico Maritime Cadet Apprenticeship Program
data.description: The biggest cruise company globally has extended its collaboration with the Maritime & Port University of Mexico to provide onboard training chances with Princess Cruises for maritime students in Mexico. An addendum was signed at Seatrade Cruise Global to solidify the partnership, showcasing the company's proactive commitment. This initiative will benefit numerous students by allowing them to gain practical experience within the cruise industry.

data.title: Square 9 Softworks to Deliver Breakout Session at Directions North America on AI-Driven Data Flow for Dynamics
data.description: At Directions North America in New Haven, Conn. on April 23, 2026, Square 9 Softworks will lead a session on improving ERP outcomes through data ingestion. The session will provide a new approach for attendees, showcasing a smarter way to handle data. This session will offer valuable insights and perspectives to improve ERP functionality.

data.title: AULUMU Wins Red Dot Design Award 2026 with M10 Power Bank and G05 Air 5-in-1 MagSafe Stand
data.description: Shenzhen, China - AULUMU was recently awarded the renowned Red Dot Design Award 2026 for two of its products, the M10 Multi-Charging Dual-Mag Power Bank and the G05 Air 5-in-1 MagSafe Stand. This recognition highlights AULUMU's dedication to merging innovation and design excellence.

data.title: 5WPR and Talent Resources Release New Research: The Celebrity-Brand Fit Index
data.description: A recent 60-page study conducted in New York has evaluated the impact of celebrity partnerships across eight consumer sectors. The study assesses the value added or negatively impacted by celebrity involvement, highlighting a shift from traditional endorsement deals to equity partnerships. This structural change has led to significant commercial success over the past five years. The study ranks the consumer sectors based on the outcomes of these partnerships, showcasing the evolving dynamics in the industry.

data.title: 5WPR Research Quantifies "The Crisis Tax" -- The Measurable Shareholder Cost of Poor Crisis Communications
data.description: A recent analysis delved into 9 corporate crises that occurred between 2010 and 2024, revealing that poor communication response quality led to excess market cap losses exceeding $266 billion. The analysis was conducted by 5WPR, a prominent independent public relations and digital marketing agency based in New York.

data.title: Revenue crosses $20 billion mark with resilient growth of 3.1% in FY 26 in constant currency
data.description: Infosys, a global AI-first business leader based in Bengaluru, India, reported successful Large Deal wins totaling $14.9 billion and robust Free Cash Flow amounting to $3.7 billion. The company has forecasted FY 2027 guidance with revenue growth expected to range between 1.5% and 3.5%, along with an operating margin target of 20% to 22%. This data was released on April 23, 2026. Infosys is listed on the National Stock Exchange (NSE: INFY), Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE: INFY), and New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: INFY).

data.title: These Analysts Boost Their Forecasts On Texas Instruments After Upbeat Q1 Earnings
data.description: Texas Instruments Inc. (NASDAQ: TXN) announced its first-quarter financial results, surpassing expectations. The company reported $4.83 billion in revenue for the quarter, exceeding analyst estimates of $4.53 billion. Earnings for the quarter were $1.68 per share, beating expectations of $1.37 per share. For the second quarter, Texas Instruments anticipates revenue between $5 billion and $5.40 billion, higher than the estimated $4.86 billion. Earnings for the upcoming quarter are projected to be $1.77 to $2.05 per share, surpassing estimates of $1.57 per share. The company highlighted its cash flow from operations at $7.8 billion for the past 12 months, showcasing the robustness of its business model and the value of its product lineup. These positive results were attributed to the efficiency of its 300mm production.

data.title: AdvisorShares Issues Statement on Finalization of Federal Cannabis Rescheduling
data.description: The manager of MSOS's portfolio has described recent developments as a significant turning point for the cannabis sector in the United States. Located in Bethesda, Maryland, on April 23, 2026, AdvisorShares, a prominent provider of actively managed ETFs, and the primary asset manager for American and worldwide cannabis securities, made this statement.

data.title: SuperCom to Report Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results on April 28th, 2026
data.description: SuperCom, a leading global company specializing in secure solutions for e-Government, IoT, and Cybersecurity industries, is set to conduct a conference call on April 28, 2026, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time (7 a.m. Pacific Time / 5 p.m. IL time). The company's NASDAQ code is SPCB.

data.title: Middlefield Short Duration Bond Plus ETF Distributions
data.description: In Toronto on April 23, 2026, Middlefield Short Duration Bond Plus ETF (TSX: MSBP) shared news of upcoming distributions for Q2 2026. The Fund will be issuing payments to unitholders comprising of Middlefield Short Duration Bond Plus ETF.

data.title: Actelis Networks Secures New Order for Alaska State Department of Transportation Intelligent Transportation System Project
data.description: The recent deployment has expanded the company's list of U.S. state, county, and municipal transportation agency clients, adding to its continued growth. This deployment marks a significant milestone in the company's operations, showcasing an increasing number of public sector customers utilizing their services. It exemplifies a positive trend in client acquisition within the transportation sector.

data.title: These Analysts Revise Their Forecasts On IBM After Q1 Results
data.description: After Wednesday's closing bell, IBM (NYSE: IBM) released its first-quarter results, outperforming expectations. Earnings reached $1.91 per share, surpassing analyst predictions of $1.81 by 5.52%, as per Benzinga Pro data. The quarterly revenue stood at $15.92 billion, beating estimates of $15.62 billion and showing growth from the previous year's $14.54 billion. IBM anticipates over 5% constant currency growth and a $1 billion increase in year-over-year cash flow by 2026. The company stated, "The first quarter marked a strong start, demonstrating broad-based revenue growth across our segments. Our integrated portfolio continues to garner trust from clients seeking operational enhancement. As AI applications expand, clients rely on our solutions." For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: CrowdStrike Launches Project QuiltWorks, Uniting the Cybersecurity Industry as Frontier AI Models Accelerate Risk
data.description: In Austin, Texas, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) announced the launch of Project QuiltWorks, a coalition of ecosystem partners aimed at addressing vulnerabilities in production code. The initiative, in response to the increasing discoveries by AI models, will assess, prioritize, and continuously remediate these vulnerabilities. Partners in Project QuiltWorks include Accenture, EY, IBM Cybersecurity Services, Kroll, OpenAI, and CrowdStrike alongside its broader partner ecosystem. The project seeks to assist organizations in addressing concerns raised by their boards regarding exposure to vulnerabilities.

data.title: InnoCare Releases 2026 Q1 Results: Strong Revenue Growth and Sustained Profitability
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, InnoCare maintained its profitability, experiencing a substantial year-on-year net profit surge of 607.7% to reach RMB 102.4 million.
